releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Issue notification only when text is actually transformed by @keathmilligan in https://github.com/keathmilligan/obsidian-paste-reformatter/pull/4
* Enhance paste override behavior by @keathmilligan in https://github.com/keathmilligan/obsidian-paste-reformatter/pull/5
  * Make overriding default paste behavior optional.
  * Reduce conflicts with other plugins that override paste behavior by not preventing the default behavior unless a transformation is actually performed.
  * Add discrete **Reformat and Paste** command as an alternative to overriding default paste behavior.
  * Don't prevent normal paste behavior if the clipboard content type is not supported (e.g. not HTML or plain text).
* Update README by @keathmilligan in https://github.com/keathmilligan/obsidian-paste-reformatter/pull/6

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/keathmilligan/obsidian-paste-reformatter/compare/1.0.0...1.1.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Issue notification only when text is actually transformed by @keathmilligan in https://github.com/keathmilligan/obsidian-paste-reformatter/pull/4
* Enhance paste override behavior by @keathmilligan in https://github.com/keathmilligan/obsidian-paste-reformatter/pull/5
  * Make overriding default paste behavior optional.
  * Reduce conflicts with other plugins that override paste behavior by not preventing the default behavior unless a transformation is actually performed.
  * Add discrete **Reformat and Paste** command as an alternative to overriding default paste behavior.
  * Don't prevent normal paste behavior if the clipboard content type is not supported (e.g. not HTML or plain text).
* Update README by @keathmilligan in https://github.com/keathmilligan/obsidian-paste-reformatter/pull/6

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/keathmilligan/obsidian-paste-reformatter/compare/1.0.0...1.1.0
